ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., Missense, Nonsense) */,
  "variant_class" REAL /* Class of variant (e.g., Pathogenic, Benign) */,
  "disease_phenotype" TEXT /* Disease or phenotype associated with the variant */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene affected by the variant */,
  "genomic_coordinates_grch37" TEXT /* Genomic coordinates (GRCh37/hg19) */,
  "genomic_sequence_context_grch37" TEXT /* Genomic sequence context (GRCh37/hg19) */,
  "genomic_coordinates_grch38" TEXT /* Genomic coordinates (GRCh38) */,
  "dbsnp_id" TEXT /* dbSNP ID */,
  "comment_justification" TEXT /* Justification for the comment */,
  "variant_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the variant in the population */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population in which the frequency is observed */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the variant */,
  "last_evaluated_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was last evaluated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the variant data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_gene_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("gene_symbol") REFERENCES genes ("gene_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* UniProt ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code */,
  "omim_id" TEXT /* OMIM ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_disease_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., causal, risk factor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_disease_associations_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_disease_associations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., annotation, curation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_comments_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Disease or phenotype associated with the variant
